changes: Rewrote skill description to focus on RSS/XML parsing and structured JSON output
Added concurrent feed fetching pattern using background processes with `wait` to handle slow feeds
Replaced grep/sed-based XML parsing with Python xml.etree.ElementTree example
Added explicit guidance to always fetch ALL 4 feed categories (Technology, Business, World, Science)
Added structured JSON output template with required `highlights` array spanning multiple categories
Added key numbers extraction guidance (at least 8, with value and context)
Removed irrelevant voice summary / OpenAI TTS section
Removed duplicate feed URLs (Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera duplicated BBC endpoints)
